original_image_tags: Handwritten note in bottom left, "53 AUG 28 1952".

elements.description: A typed office memorandum on Standard Form No. 64. The document contains typed text, form fields, several rubber stamps (e.g., 'ENCL', 'ENCLOS. ATTACHED', 'RECORDED - 44', 'INDEXED - 44', 'AUG 13 1952', '53 AUG 28 1952'), handwritten annotations, and red checkmarks. No photographs, sketches, or other graphical content are present.

judge.reason: Both sides mention the same rubber stamp '53 AUG 28 1952', but Description A places it on a handwritten note while Description B lists it as one of several rubber stamps without specifying its location or medium.
